description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 5/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Confirm session context, conversation id, agent id, handoff owner, trace, and
  snapshot helpers.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Expanded session lifecycle coverage to call Session.snapshot/2 and Session.trace/2 directly after a session chat turn, alongside existing context, conversation id, agent id, inspect_request/trace, and handoff helper coverage. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.
